name: Ninjutsu Research Club + Pandemonium Society - Trip to Brazil /Vacation
description:
The Pandemonium Society and the Ninjutsu Research Club take a trip to Brazil.

Theme song: Cidade Maravilhosa (Joyce Moreno)

Day -1: One day until our flight.

First time leaving Kivotos. Everyone’s a little nervous (except Ibuki, who thinks we’re going to “the jungle kingdom of talking birds and chocolate”).

Makoto said I should at least pretend to be responsible, so I started writing this log to help us remember what we’re even doing. Mostly so we don’t spend the entire trip lost and yelling at each other.

We're heading to a town called Itacaré in Bahia, Brazil. It's small, tropical, has no big airport. After landing, we’ll have to rent a car and drive a few hours inland. I think it’s safe. Probably. I'll drive, as I was the one who printed a map. (Left it in my other jacket. Will reprint.)

What I Know So Far:

Itacaré is full of jungles, secret beaches, waterfalls, and mosquitoes the size of drones (Sensei's words).

The locals speak Portuguese, which I don’t. But I do have an app for that. As long as I have signal. And battery.

The food has stuff like moqueca (fish stew), acarajé (fried stuff), and drinks made of fruits I can’t pronounce. I’m gonna try one of everything. For research.

Guns are not allowed. Most countries outside Kivotos only allow the police to wield them legally. I suppose that's a cultural difference we'll have to get used to. People outside Kivotos don't seem to have halos, from what Sensei told me, so a single bullet could be fatal. I worry about the locals, if we'll be bringing Makoto along.

Cultural Notes (aka "things I skimmed online"):

Itacaré used to be a cocoa farming town. Then chocolate crops died. Now it’s a surfer-hippie-nature-tourist place.

There’s something called the Atlantic Forest around it. It’s rare and full of endangered animals and trees that look like they eat people. Makoto will definitely try to bring something back to Kivotos if I don't keep an eye on her.

Capoeira is a local martial art that looks like dancing but can break your teeth if you’re not careful. Ibuki seems to want to try it (Makoto said no).

Packing List:

  • Sunscreen ✅

  • Bug spray ✅

  • Swimsuit (undecided)

  • Notebook (this one) ✅

  • Emergency sweets stash for Ibuki ✅

  • Rental car instructions in Portuguese (half translated, half guessing) ❌

To-Do When We Get There:

  • Don’t let Ibuki eat random plants.

  • Stop Makoto from building a survival shelter on the first night.

  • Find a quiet cove to nap at. Document jungle sounds. Try not to fall asleep while writing.

  • Send Sensei a postcard if I remember. (Maybe.)

Final Thoughts Before Bed:

This trip might actually be... kinda fun? I don’t get to leave the city much, and Itacaré looks like one of those places you see in documentaries where they say “untouched natural paradise” in slow-motion.
If I don’t get eaten by a tree frog, I’ll write more once we arrive.

– Iroha, semi-official trip captain (because no one else wanted to do the paperwork)
P.S. Ibuki packed seven plushies. I give it two days before she starts assigning them government roles with Makoto.

I swear to god if I get nuked for including A SMALL HANDFUL OF LINES about Ibuki I will get so sad. it's 3:14am right now and I've got work tomorrow. Please let this work ;-;

Full artwork here.
creator: ZenMode
